DISCOVERY 302, NO APPEARANCES. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF MERCEDES-BENZ FINANCIAL SERVICES USA LLC'S HEARING ON ON APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY 6, 2013 AT 9:30 AM TO GIVE MERCEDES BENZ THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MERCEDES BENZ MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS, INCLUDING PROOFS OF SERVICE, TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN APRIL 24, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. JUDGE PRO TEM PAUL RENNE, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Application For Writ Of Possesion And Hearing; Application
Off Calendar Apr-24-2013 Continued To May-06-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFF MERCEDES-BENZ FINANCIAL SERVICES USA LLC'S HEARING ON Application For Writ Of PossesSion IS Continued on the court's own motion to May 6, 2013 at 9:30 am to give Mercedes Benz the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Mercedes Benz must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers, including proofs of service, to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 24, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. JUDGE PRO TEM PAUL RENNE, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
